shot_context.shot_emotion_summary: Tender vulnerability: the primary figure shows quiet longing transitioning to a fragile, uncertain smile. The background figure is barely visible.
shot_context.shot_motion_summary: Minimal motion. A slow head tilt and a hand rising to touch own neck — a self-soothing gesture of nervous vulnerability.

scene_context.visible_setting: Sun-dappled garden terrace, warm golden afternoon light, stone balustrade blurred in background
scene_context.narrative_situation: An intimate moment of unspoken connection between two people

face_analysis.expression_caption: A smile that arrives reluctantly and does not quite commit. It begins in the eyes — a softening of the orbital tension, a brightening of the gaze as it lifts. The mouth follows slowly: the corners pull upward by degrees, but the upper lip does not fully engage, creating an asymmetric half-smile that favors the left side. The smile is tinged with nervousness: the lower lip is caught briefly between the teeth in the early frames, and even at its fullest the expression retains a guarded quality, as though the joy it represents is too new and too fragile to be shown entirely.

alternative_captions.direct: His eyes soften first. Then the mouth smiles gradually — asymmetric, left side higher. The lower lip is briefly bitten. The smile stays guarded.
alternative_captions.literary: Joy arrives on his face like light under a door — first a brightening of the eyes, then a slow unlocking of the mouth that never fully opens, as though what he feels is still partly a secret he is keeping from himself.
alternative_captions.direction: Build the smile from the eyes outward. Beat 1: eye soften, orbital relax. Beat 2: lip bite, release. Beat 3: left corner of mouth lifts — asymmetric, slight. Hold. Never fully commit — the beauty is in the incompleteness. Keep a thread of vulnerability in the upper eyelids.
alternative_captions.situational: As if he is allowing himself to feel something he has been resisting, and the smile is the first crack in that resistance — not a surrender, but an admission.

facial_components.eyes: Softened, brightened, upward gaze, slight orbital relaxation, lids at natural opening
facial_components.eyebrows: Neutral to slightly raised, soft, no tension
facial_components.mouth: Asymmetric half-smile favoring left side, lower lip briefly caught between teeth then released
facial_components.jaw: Relaxed, slightly dropped on the smile

facial_attributes.distinctive_notes: Curly dark hair catching golden light. Sun-tanned skin. Strong nose.

body_analysis.motion_caption: Very little body motion. His head tilts slowly to the right — a gentle, unforced inclination that takes about a second to complete. His right hand rises from below frame to touch the side of his own neck, fingers resting lightly on the skin just below the jaw — a self-soothing gesture of nervous vulnerability. The hand stays there, not gripping, just resting. His shoulders are relaxed and slightly asymmetric — left dropped a centimeter lower than right, creating a casual, open posture.

alternative_captions.direct: His head tilts right slowly. His right hand rises to touch the side of his neck. Shoulders relaxed and slightly asymmetric.
alternative_captions.literary: He tilts into the moment the way a flower tilts toward light — slowly, without deciding to — and his hand finds his own neck, fingers resting there like a question he is not ready to ask out loud.
alternative_captions.direction: Slow head tilt right, 1 second. Right hand rises to own neck — light touch, fingers on skin below jaw. Not a grip, not a scratch. A resting. Left shoulder drops 1cm lower than right — asymmetric ease. Minimal. Everything here is small.
alternative_captions.situational: With the unconscious body language of someone who is simultaneously trying to appear casual and failing beautifully at it.

upper_body_detail.head: Slow tilt to the right, approximately 10-15 degrees, gentle and unforced
upper_body_detail.neck: Exposed on the left side by the tilt, right hand resting on right side
upper_body_detail.shoulders: Relaxed, slightly asymmetric — left dropped 1cm lower than right
upper_body_detail.arms: Right arm rises from below frame. Left arm not visible.
upper_body_detail.hands: Right hand resting lightly on right side of neck below jaw — fingers flat, no grip. Left hand not visible.

body_analysis.gesture_detail: Right hand rises to right side of own neck — a self-touching gesture with fingers resting flat on skin below the jawline. Not scratching, not gripping — a light, sustained contact that reads as nervous self-soothing. Head tilts right slowly and holds.

facial_attributes.distinctive_notes: Blurred in background. Face too small and defocused for expression analysis.
